reviews.comment:
No cargue combustible solo pare para ir a los sanitarios. Mucha suciedad. Como socia del ACA una gran desilusión.
Pero lo peor fue la empleada del shop cuando le pedi q por su intermedio dejar un mensaje al encargado.
Una maleducada.
Segun ella las pasajeras somos las sucias q no cuidamos y q no tenia q quejarme. Horrible actitud.
Viendo que era imposible el diálogo me retire 🤷‍♀️👎

(Translated by Google)
I didn't refuel; I only stopped to use the restrooms. Very dirty. As an ACA member, I was extremely disappointed.

But the worst part was the shop employee when I asked her to leave a message for the manager.
She was incredibly rude.
According to her, we female passengers are the dirty ones who don't take care of things and that I shouldn't complain. A horrible attitude.
Seeing that dialogue was impossible, I left. 🤷‍♀️👎
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCLV9UMzZRRRAB
